title: docs: clarify bools in `podman --help`
body:
* clarify that --syslog and --trace expects arguments
* mention defaults in --help text
* add --trace to docs

Should we document --trace or hide it as an option?  Do we want users actually using this?

> Should we document --trace or hide it as an option? Do we want users actually using this?

No preference. The purist inside of me just wants consistency :^)
@baude @mheon  WDYT.   I think we should remove documentation for it and hide it.
